hero.subtitle: Junior Full Stack Developer · Java · JavaScript · React · Python

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Junior <highlight>Full Stack Developer</highlight> with a double technical degree in <highlight>Multiplatform Application Development</highlight> and <highlight>IT Systems & Networking</highlight>.
about.p2: I've built and deployed complete projects with <highlight>Java Spring Boot</highlight>, <highlight>React</highlight> and <highlight>Python</highlight>, using <highlight>Docker</highlight> containerization, CI/CD with <highlight>GitHub Actions</highlight> and deployment on <highlight>Vercel</highlight>.
about.p3: Hybrid profile combining development with hands-on knowledge of <highlight>infrastructure, networking and Linux server administration</highlight>.

projects.title: Projects
projects.error: Could not load projects right now.

descriptions.SysAdmin-Monitor: Real-time monitoring system. REST API with Java Spring Boot and PostgreSQL, Python agent (psutil), JavaScript dashboard with Chart.js, Docker Compose deployment and CI/CD with GitHub Actions.
descriptions.Scraper-InfoJobs-Python: Python bot with Selenium for extracting job listings from InfoJobs. Modular design with 6 independent modules, captcha detection, Dataclasses, CSV/JSON export, history system and Chrome auto-detection.

job1.task1: Developed over 20 corporate websites and e-commerce stores with WordPress and WooCommerce, coordinating tasks with Asana (Kanban).
job1.task2: Backend customization with PHP and server configuration (.htaccess).
job1.task3: Performance optimization (WPO): improved load times and Core Web Vitals.

job2.task1: Windows/Linux workstation administration and local network setup.
job2.task2: Hardware diagnostics and Level 1/2 incident resolution.
job2.task3: Deployment and configuration of end-user work environments.
